OpCoConfig.title: OpCo Configuration
OpCoConfig.description: User specific clinical and operational assumptions for the OpCo cascade.

userId.description: The unique Firebase Auth UID of the user.

userEmail.description: The email address of the authenticated user.

updatedAt.description: The Firestore server timestamp of the last save.

assumptions.description: Key-value map of numerical and boolean operational assumptions.

PropCoConfig.title: PropCo Configuration
PropCoConfig.description: User specific property, build, and development assumptions for the PropCo cascade.

userId.description: The unique Firebase Auth UID of the user.

userEmail.description: The email address of the authenticated user.

updatedAt.description: The Firestore server timestamp of the last save.

assumptions.description: Key-value map of property, build, and debt assumptions.

/opcoConfigs/{userId}.description: The user's individual custom configuration for Clinical Operations.

/propcoConfigs/{userId}.description: The user's individual custom configuration for physical construction and PropCo financing.
